author: CROSZY.
title: Artwork
content: The app is great ! But i have one problem.when i try to change artworks for songs i have to do it one by one .so can you add a feature like change playlist artwork by one click and all the songs get same artwork of the playlist.it will be very helpful for us !

author: Nuwanidu
title: Good
content: best music app in the world

author: Kaviiz"
title: App is so good but,
content: When we add an lrc file to the Evermusic folder, the lyrics are shown only when we open the song from the folder, but when we open the song from the app, it does not show, is there a solution?

author: KFgayan
title: Best of the best app for music
content: Equalizer is great! Developer thought about many helpful features when creating the app. Well done! Most importantly its free to use with few ads
